'''Wonetun''' was a [[Brubb]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Baros]], powerfully built, and had a voice as raspy as his pitted hide. He was one of the [[Wild Knights]], a fighter squadron made up of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], and was personally trained by [[Saba Sebatyne]]. He ultimately survived the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], participating in engagements at [[Reecee/Legends|Reecee]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], and the final [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]].

[[35 ABY/Legends|Five years]] after the end of the Yuuzhan Vong war, Wonetun was an official [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], and was one of many [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who sided with [[Kyp Durron]] and volunteered to fly a [[StealthX]] in a mission to rescue [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] space.

In [[44 ABY]], Wonetun was one of several veteran Jedi pilots to help lead the [[StealthX]] wing to aid Luke Skywalker and [[Ben Skywalker]] in their fight against the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]] and [[Abeloth]].
